name: Herta
desc: Member <unbreak>83</unbreak> of the Genius Society. The real master of the space station.\nAn incredibly intelligent yet unsympathetic scientist.

1.name: Kick You When You're Down
1.desc: When using Basic ATK, if the designated enemy's HP percentage is at <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or less, additionally deals Ice <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Herta's ATK.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

2.name: Keep the Ball Rolling
2.desc: Every time Talent is triggered, this character's CRIT Rate increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).

3.name: That's the Kind of Girl I Am
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Hit Where It Hurts
4.desc: When Talent is triggered, DMG increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: Cuss Big or Cuss Nothing
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: No One Can Betray Me
6.desc: After using Ultimate, this character's ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

101301.name: What Are You Looking At?
101301.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Herta's ATK to one designated enemy.
101301.simple_desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one enemy.

101302.name: One-Time Offer
101302.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Herta's ATK to all enemies. If the enemy's HP percentage is <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> or higher, DMG dealt to this target increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.
101302.simple_desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to all enemies. Targets with higher HP will receive increased DMG.

101303.name: <unbreak>It's Magic,</unbreak> <unbreak>I Added Some Magic</unbreak>
101303.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Herta's ATK to all enemies.
101303.simple_desc: Deals Ice DMG to all enemies.

101304.name: Fine, I'll Do It Myself
101304.desc: When an ally target's attack causes an enemy target's HP percentage to fall to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or lower, Herta will launch a <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, dealing Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Herta's ATK to all enemies.
101304.simple_desc: When any ally target's attack reduces the enemy target's current HP percentage to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> or lower, Herta immediately launches <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color>, dealing minor Ice DMG to all enemies.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

101306.name: Attack
101306.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

101307.name: It Can Still Be Optimized
101307.desc: After using her Technique, Herta's ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s) at the beginning of the next battle.
101307.simple_desc: After using Technique, increases this unit's ATK at the start of the next battle.

1.point_desc: When Skill is used, the DMG Boost effect on target enemies increases by an extra <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
Increases the chance to resist <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

1.point_desc: When Ultimate is used, deals <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> more DMG to Frozen enemies.
